channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.8%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer leadership latest: Streeting resigns from cabinet ahead of expected challenge to PM

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: 🚨 BREAKING: Wes Streeting resigns
"Where we need vision, we have a vacuum. Where we need direction, we have drift. This was underscored by your speech on Monday. Leaders take responsibility, but too often that has m...

item.title: LabourList: Wes Streeting resigns from Cabinet and says PM cannot lead Labour into next election

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: BREAKING: Wes Streeting has resigned and called on Keir Starmer to stand down as Prime Minister
